results.description: Happy customer who agrees to pay via UPI — tests golden path flow

transcript.content: Hello, namaskar! Main Anushka bol rahi hoon XYZ Finance ki taraf se. Aapke loan account ke baare mein ek quick baat karni thi — kya abhi thoda time hai?
Toh Sir, aapki XYZ Finance EMI — rupees fifteen hundred — due hai agle do dinon mein. Kya aap aaj payment kar paayenge, ya main help kar sakti hoon?
Haan, main aaj hi payment kar dunga.
Payment ke liye hamare paas char options hain. Option one: UPI — main aapke is number pe ek payment link bhej sakti hoon.
UPI chunna chahiye, payment link mera number pe aayega na?
Haan Sir, bilkul. Main abhi link bhej rahi hoon — aapko paanch minute mein SMS aa jaayega, uspe click karke aap payment complete kar sakte hain.

Aapka swagat hai Sir. Toh Sir, just to confirm — aapko UPI payment link SMS ke through mil jaayega. Confirmation SMS bhi aa jaayega. Koi aur help chahiye toh humein call kar saktey hain. Have a great day!
